title: Lifesteal Enchantment
description: Ever wanted to regenerate health while fighting your opponents?
body:
# 📢Announcement
All future updates to this datapack will be available only on [Way too many Enchantments](https://modrinth.com/project/silvers_way-too-many-enchantments!), this will also mean this project will be permenantly archived until further notice.

# Description:
Ever wanted to regenerate health while fighting your opponents?

well, with this enchantment you will gain regeneration I for 2 to 3 seconds, with the level of enchantment dictating the effects amplifier!

and if you want the axe version you can check here [Reaping Enchantment](https://modrinth.com/project/silvers_reaping-enchantment).


### Comments:
Well? Did you like it?, Consider checking my other Datapacks!
- [Way too many Datapacks!](https://modrinth.com/collection/aqrbm311)
- [Way too many Enchantments!](https://modrinth.com/collection/90b6VDPP)
